summary: Completed backend testing of admin features (iteration 18). All 19 tests passed (100%). Fixed 1 bug in safe_disclosure.py (send_email called with invalid 'to_name' parameter). Verified: 1) Admin stats returns correct user counts from tenant database, 2) Events CSV template and export working, 3) Dining menu CSV export working, 4) Admin create tutor endpoint working, 5) Announcements expiry/archive features working, 6) Safe disclosure email forwarding endpoint working (after bug fix).

minor.issue: Returns 422 validation error before checking auth for students - validation happens before authorization check

bugs_fixed.root_cause: send_email function in email_service.py only accepts to_email, subject, html_content, text_content parameters

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Admin stats endpoint correctly uses tenant-specific database (tenant_db.users) for accurate user counts
✓ Events CSV template and export endpoints properly implemented with admin-only access
✓ Dining menu CSV export endpoint properly implemented with admin-only access
✓ Admin create tutor endpoint allows direct tutor creation without application process
✓ Announcements support expires_at field and archive functionality
✓ Safe disclosure forward endpoint now works correctly after bug fix
seed_data_creation: Created test announcements with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All admin features tested and working. Key findings: 1) Admin stats uses tenant-specific database for accurate user counts, 2) Events and Dining CSV export/template endpoints working, 3) Admin can create tutors directly via POST /api/tutoring/admin/create, 4) Announcements support expires_at and archive features, 5) Safe disclosure forward endpoint fixed (removed invalid to_name parameter). Note: POST /api/tutoring/admin/create returns 422 for students instead of 403 (validation before auth check - minor issue).
